---
title: "Buckthorn (Rhamnus cathartica)"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

**Family:** [Rhamnaceae](/trees/family/rhamnaceae.html)

**Genus:** [*Rhamnus*](/trees/genus/rhamnus.html)

| Tree | Planted |
| --- | --- |
| [Tree 179 — Buckthorn](../179.html) |  |
| [Tree 183 — Buckthorn](../183.html) |  |
| [Tree 317 — Buckthorn](../317.html) |  |
